commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=adbf89d6d33c05548a90fcd11ee5bfe9423cd530)
commands.review_summary:
This PR imports the subagent liveness helper into orphan recovery and finalizes stale restart-aborted subagent runs instead of resuming them.

PR surface: Source +30. Total +30 across 1 file.

Reproducibility: yes. source-level: current main reaches the orphan recovery gate for restart-aborted runs without checking `isLiveUnendedSubagentRun`, while the shared liveness helper already marks stale unended runs inactive. I did not run a live gateway restart because this review is read-only.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] Human review is needed because the branch has a blocking finalization ownership defect and contributor-only real behavior proof is still insufficient.

target.title: fix(agents): skip stale orphaned subagent sessions during restart recovery
target.body:
## Summary

After a gateway restart, `recoverOrphanedSubagentSessions()` scans for interrupted subagent runs and attempts to resume them — but it did not check whether a run had exceeded the **existing** subagent run-liveness window. A subagent interrupted days ago could be resurrected on the next restart, replaying stale work and producing misleading late completions.

This PR adds a staleness check using the existing `isLiveUnendedSubagentRun()` from `subagent-run-liveness.ts` **before** attempting automatic recovery. Stale runs are finalized via `finalizeInterruptedSubagentRun()` instead of being resumed. This reuses the established liveness policy, respects `runTimeoutSeconds` extensions, and covers both direct and restored-run paths.

Fixes #90766

## Changes

- **`src/agents/subagent-orphan-recovery.ts`**: Import `isLiveUnendedSubagentRun`. Before attempting recovery, check if the run is still live. Stale runs are finalized. Only 1 file, +30 lines.

## Real behavior proof

**Behavior addressed:** Orphaned subagent runs with no liveness check can be resurrected long after they exceeded the run-liveness window.

**Real environment tested:** Node v22.22.0, Linux 4.19.112-2.el8.x86_64, commit 7f9898987b. tsx v4.22.3 used from within the openclaw repo.

**Exact steps or command run after this patch:**

1. Wrote proof script at scripts/proof-91668.mjs that imports isLiveUnendedSubagentRun from the actual production module at src/agents/subagent-run-liveness.js
2. Script simulates 3 subagent runs interrupted by a gateway restart: Subagent A (30 min old), Subagent B (3 hours old), Subagent C (3h old with 4h timeout)
3. Ran npx tsx scripts/proof-91668.mjs from the openclaw repo root
4. Deleted proof script after capturing evidence

**Evidence after fix (terminal capture):**

$ npx tsx scripts/proof-91668.mjs

openclaw orphan recovery gate verification

=== BEFORE FIX (current main) ===
recoverOrphanedSubagentSessions would resume ALL aborted runs:
  Subagent A: RESUMED (no staleness check)
  Subagent B: RESUMED (no staleness check)
  Subagent C: RESUMED (no staleness check)

=== AFTER FIX (this patch) ===
isLiveUnendedSubagentRun gate applied before resume:
  Subagent A: RECOVERED (resumed) [isLiveUnendedSubagentRun=true]
  Subagent B: FINALIZED (not resurrected) [isLiveUnendedSubagentRun=false]
  Subagent C: RECOVERED (resumed) [isLiveUnendedSubagentRun=true]

Subagent B correctly blocked from recovery.
STALE_UNENDED_SUBAGENT_RUN_MS = 2h is respected.
exit code: 0

**Observed result after fix:** Before fix: all 3 subagents RESUMED. After fix: Subagent B (stale, 3h old) changes to FINALIZED. Subagents A (30 min) and C (4h timeout) remain RECOVERED. The isLiveUnendedSubagentRun gate prevents stale orphan resurrection.

**What was not tested:** Full gateway restart with live subagents, finalizeInterruptedSubagentRun parent notification path, scheduleOrphanRecovery retry loop.
target.author: chengzhichao-xydt

commands.reason: repair commands require a ClawSweeper PR or a PR opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge
